'''âk-p-m-t''' ('''kakapmetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vasten|vasten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-m-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vasten|vasten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-p-m-t
|-
! Lemma
| kakapmetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikapmetoko|thikapmetoko]] || [[word:jikapmetoko|jikapmetoko]] || [[word:shikapmetoko|shikapmetoko]] || [[word:kikapmetoko|kikapmetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukapmetoko|thuthukapmetoko]] || [[word:jujukapmetoko|jujukapmetoko]] || [[word:shushukapmetoko|shushukapmetoko]] || [[word:kukukapmetoko|kukukapmetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukapmetoko|thukapmetoko]] || [[word:jukapmetoko|jukapmetoko]] || [[word:shukapmetoko|shukapmetoko]] || [[word:kukapmetoko|kukapmetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukapmetoko|thukapmetoko]] || [[word:jukapmetoko|jukapmetoko]] || [[word:shukapmetoko|shukapmetoko]] || [[word:kukapmetoko|kukapmetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekapmetoko|thekapmetoko]] || [[word:jekapmetoko|jekapmetoko]] || [[word:shekapmetoko|shekapmetoko]] || [[word:kekapmetoko|kekapmetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokapmetoko|thothokapmetoko]] || [[word:jojokapmetoko|jojokapmetoko]] || [[word:shoshokapmetoko|shoshokapmetoko]] || [[word:kokokapmetoko|kokokapmetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokapmetoko|thokapmetoko]] || [[word:jokapmetoko|jokapmetoko]] || [[word:shokapmetoko|shokapmetoko]] || [[word:kokapmetoko|kokapmetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokapmetoko|thokapmetoko]] || [[word:jokapmetoko|jokapmetoko]] || [[word:shokapmetoko|shokapmetoko]] || [[word:kokapmetoko|kokapmetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkapmetoko|thĂŠkapmetoko]] || [[word:jĂŠkapmetoko|jĂŠkapmetoko]] || [[word:shĂŠkapmetoko|shĂŠkapmetoko]] || [[word:kĂŠkapmetoko|kĂŠkapmetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakapmetoko|thathakapmetoko]] || [[word:jajakapmetoko|jajakapmetoko]] || [[word:shashakapmetoko|shashakapmetoko]] || [[word:kakakapmetoko|kakakapmetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapmetoko|thakapmetoko]] || [[word:jakapmetoko|jakapmetoko]] || [[word:shakapmetoko|shakapmetoko]] || [[word:kakapmetoko|kakapmetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapmetoko|thakapmetoko]] || [[word:jakapmetoko|jakapmetoko]] || [[word:shakapmetoko|shakapmetoko]] || [[word:kakapmetoko|kakapmetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
